global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with promotional text and product selection boxes.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 offer with free delivery.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire banner, providing a vibrant and eye-catching base.

elements.label: Three empty boxes
elements.description: Three rectangular boxes with rounded corners are displayed in a row, suggesting a product selection or options.

elements.label: Empty box
elements.description: A single empty rectangular box with rounded corners, positioned among other similar boxes, indicating a choice.

elements.label: Empty box
elements.description: Another empty rectangular box with rounded corners, part of a series of boxes, hinting at product options.

elements.label: Circular indicator
elements.description: A small circular indicator positioned to the left of the boxes, suggesting selection or interaction.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating '2-for-1 tonight Free delivery over $15' is prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The logo 'FreshDash' is presented in a bold font at the top, colored in white against the blue background.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button with the text 'Order now' in white, located at the bottom center of the banner.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small circular badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, contrasting yellow text.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, promotional text, product selection
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by promotional text in the center, with product boxes below and a CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: 2-for-1 tonight Free delivery over $15, FreshDash, Order now, SALE
